title: Lucid Group (LCID) Stock Price Predictions & Analyst Outlook
text: Lucid Group (LCID) Stock Price Predictions & Analyst Outlook. Analyst Price Targets. Current consensus: Analysts rate LCID as a Sell with an average price target of $9.99 based on 15 analysts' ratings. The highest forecast reaches $30, while the lowest sits at $1 (pre-split adjusted). Year-by-Year Predictions. Year 2026: Moderate upside from current ~$8 levels. Year 2027: Modest gains expected. Year 2030: $5.42 average (range: $3.03-$6.64). Key Findings. Bull Case highlights: EV industry projected 6.01% compounded annual growth through 2029. Company targets 171,000 annual unit sales by 2030. Stock's 3.8-4.1 EV/sales ratio is lower than its 3-year average of approximately 9.4. Bear Case concerns: Net profit margin of approximately -290.7%. Lucid loses money on each vehicle sold. Intense competition from Tesla and BYD.
